allow: Bash(AWS_PROFILE=personal-dev aws dynamodb wait table-exists --table-name "My-health-DB" --region ap-south-1)
Bash(AWS_PROFILE=personal-dev aws dynamodb scan --table-name My-health-DB --region ap-south-1 --output json)
Bash(AWS_PROFILE=personal-dev aws dynamodb describe-table --table-name My-health-DB --region ap-south-1 --output json)

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; t=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['Table']; print\('Status:', t['TableStatus']\); print\('Keys:', t['KeySchema']\); print\('BillingMode:', t.get\('BillingModeSummary', {}\).get\('BillingMode', 'PROVISIONED'\)\)")

Bash(aws --profile personal-dev --region ap-south-1 lambda wait function-active --function-name healthpulse-agentcore-proxy)

Bash(aws --profile personal-dev --region ap-south-1 lambda create-function-url-config --function-name healthpulse-agentcore-proxy --auth-type NONE --invoke-mode BUFFERED --cors '{"AllowOrigins":["*"],"AllowMethods":["POST","GET"],"AllowHeaders":["content-type","x-session-id"]}')

Bash(aws --profile personal-dev --region ap-south-1 lambda update-function-url-config --function-name healthpulse-agentcore-proxy --invoke-mode BUFFERED --cors '{"AllowOrigins":["*"],"AllowMethods":["POST","GET"],"AllowHeaders":["content-type","x-session-id"]}')

Bash(aws --profile personal-dev --region ap-south-1 lambda add-permission --function-name healthpulse-agentcore-proxy --statement-id AllowPublicFunctionURL --action lambda:InvokeFunctionUrl --principal '*' --function-url-auth-type NONE)
Bash(aws --profile personal-dev --region ap-south-1 lambda get-policy --function-name healthpulse-agentcore-proxy)
Bash(aws --profile personal-dev --region ap-south-1 lambda get-function --function-name healthpulse-agentcore-proxy --query 'Configuration.{State:State,StateReason:StateReason}')
Bash(aws --profile personal-dev --region ap-south-1 lambda get-function-url-config --function-name healthpulse-agentcore-proxy)
Bash(aws --profile personal-dev --region ap-south-1 lambda invoke --function-name healthpulse-agentcore-proxy --payload '{}' --cli-binary-format raw-in-base64-out /tmp/lambda_response.json)
Bash(aws --profile personal-dev --region ap-south-1 iam list-role-policies --role-name healthpulse-lambda-proxy-role)
Bash(aws --profile personal-dev --region ap-south-1 iam get-role-policy --role-name healthpulse-lambda-proxy-role --policy-name InvokeAgentCoreRuntime)
Bash(aws --profile personal-dev --region ap-south-1 iam put-role-policy --role-name healthpulse-lambda-proxy-role --policy-name InvokeAgentCoreRuntime --policy-document '{ *)

Bash(aws --profile personal-dev --region ap-south-1 lambda invoke --function-name healthpulse-agentcore-proxy --payload '{"requestContext":{"http":{"method":"GET"}}}' --cli-binary-format raw-in-base64-out /tmp/lambda_response.json)
Bash(aws --profile personal-dev --region ap-south-1 lambda remove-permission --function-name healthpulse-agentcore-proxy --statement-id AllowPublicFunctionURL)
